title: Cremocephalum cernuum
taxonomy: Cremocephalum cernuum is a species of flowering plant in the family Compositae, which is now often referred to as Asteraceae. This family is commonly known as the daisy or sunflower family. The Compositae family consists of over 24,000 species and is one of the largest and most diverse families of flowering plants. Cremocephalum cernuum is native to tropical Africa. It is a member of the tribe Inuleae, which is a group of flowering plants that are characterized by their small, daisy-like flowers.
